Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deposition; Discovery Responses And Request For Further Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-17-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Edward Margolin's motion to compel the deposition of defendant and responses to form interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to contact counsel for plaintiff within 10 days of notice of this order to schedule his deposition. The deposition shall be completed within 30 days of notice of this order. In addition, defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections and produce documents within 10 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $1290 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Proceedings reported by: Nici Rodich, CSR# 11604. (212)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-20-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Edward Margolin's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories and request for production of documents is ordered off calendar. A hearsay proof of service of overnight delivery is not competent evidence that the motion was served. The proof of service must be signed by the person who actually deposited the envelope in the box or other facility regularly maintained by the express service carrier or delivered to an authorized courier or driver authorized by the express service carrier to receive documents. In addition, the motion is ordered off calendar for not being timely noticed. Pursuant to CCP Section 1013, service by overnight delivery extends the period of notice by two court days. The motion was filed on May 28, 2008. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-20-2008 Continued To Jul-24-08 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. (Administrative fee) is heard this day. Court ordered OSC off calendar as to Plaintiff's Counsel/Compliance. Defendant in Propria Persona Norman Solomon is sanctioned $100.00, for failure to appear.
